title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 1–4, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. The truth of Nami’s long sacrifice collides with Marine corruption and Arlong’s manipulation.

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Ever since that day 8 years ago

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: that girl decided to not show her tears to anyone,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And never ask for help!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: All because she doesn't want to see anyone to be killed by Arlong,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Just like our mother was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how painful it was for her,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: To make that decision to fight alone and continue to live on,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: When she was barely 10 years old?

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: So in order to save her village,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She forced herself to join the very pirates who killed her mother...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: How dare they cause pain to my beloved Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'll kill those pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: W-what was that for, Sis!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's exactly what I've come to tell you not to do!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because of you going around calling Nami your friend and causing trouble,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Those pirates are starting to doubt her, putting her 8 years of hard work in jeopardy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So please... don't make her suffer anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: for her, who had to fight alone her entire life,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's nothing more painful than having others call her a friend...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: no one will be able to find it if I hide it here.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'll save up bit by bit in this treasure box and by the time it's full, I'll have 100 million belli!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: A thief!? You're going to Rob Pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's right! I'll get back at those stupid pirates for starting this age of pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nami! What's with those wounds!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I messed up a little... but look! With this, I now have 1 million belli!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: enough about that, we have to treat your wounds!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But there's still long ways to go... I still need 99 million belli more...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It's been a long while, but I'm now only need 7.million more...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: "With my experience, I should be able to get that much by setting-sail just_one more time!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just one more trip and everything will be back the way it was...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All my troubles will have been worth it...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'll finally be freed from Arlong...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And at last...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll be able to smile from the bottom of my heart, belliemere...!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
